scene_title: Enoque com o Livro de Enoque e luz cosmica
narrative_beat: Profeta anciao em branco puro e ouro sobre colina

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid prophet Enoch as ancient elder in pure white and gold robes with white hair in sacred revelation expression holding leather Book of Enoch with golden seals with cosmic light rays descending on head in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the cosmic light rays descending on Enoch's head and the Book of Enoch with golden seals
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated solitary hill with lone tree at grey dusk in background
props: prophet Enoch in pure white and gold
Book of Enoch with golden seals

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, gold saturation, divine halation

mood.emotion: Enoch who named the Watchers — the first whistleblower

symbolism.primary: the book Jesus and Jude quoted as warning for the last generation
symbolism.secondary: solitary hill as the platform of the lonely prophetic voice

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
